title: chrysosplenium sphaerospermum var. vidalii
intro: Chrysosplenium sphaerospermum var. vidalii, also known as Vidal's golden saxifrage, is a variety of flowering plant in the saxifrage family that is native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Vidal's golden saxifrage include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use as a medicinal herb is not well-documented and should be approached with caution.
